decisions.decision: Pin TZ=UTC via beforeAll(process.env.TZ='UTC') for deterministic locale-dependent output in formatTimestampLabel and formatBucketRangeLabel tests, allowing exact .toBe() assertions
alternatives_rejected: Structural/regex assertions — less precise, doesn't match repo style of exact .toBe()
Setting TZ in vitest.config.ts env — would affect all tests globally, not just this file

decisions.decision: Use @/ path aliases for imports, matching existing test convention — vitest.config.ts already has resolve.alias configured
alternatives_rejected: Relative imports — would work but breaks repo convention

decisions.decision: Test formatSignedCurrency as composed behavior (no mocking of formatCurrency), matching repo convention of no mocks for pure utility functions
alternatives_rejected: Mock formatCurrency with vi.mock() — over-isolation for pure functions, breaks repo convention

decisions.decision: Test getOutcomeColor fallback path with NaN and negative index inputs to validate the ?? defensive coding
alternatives_rejected: Skip edge cases — would leave defensive code untested

steps.task: Create test file at frontend/src/__tests__/chartUtils.test.ts with describe blocks for all 6 exported functions: getOutcomeColor, scaleNumber, buildLinePath, formatTimestampLabel, formatBucketRangeLabel, formatSignedCurrency. Pin TZ=UTC in beforeAll. Use @/ imports, exact .toBe() assertions, no mocks.
Run vitest on the new test file to verify all tests pass. If TZ=UTC doesn't work in jsdom, fall back to structural assertions for locale-dependent functions.
